---
title: "Thomas Prata"
subtitle: "Entrepreneur · Marketing Analytics & Data Strategy · AI Implementation"
---

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="32%"}
![headshot](images/headshot.jpg){width=100% style="border-radius: 50%; aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; object-fit: cover; object-position: center 30%; display: block;"}
:::
::: {.column width="68%" style="padding-left: 2.5rem;"}
### Hi, I'm Thomas.

I am an entrepreneur with a proven background, Over the last 8+ years I've co-founded and scaled a healthcare services company, launched a consumer apparel brand with my partner, and I'm currently building an AI-powered labor-compliance SaaS platform. Across all of it, the thread is the same: turn messy data into a clear story that drives the next decision.

**Based in San Dimas, CA** · [Tom@breakplate.com](mailto:Tom@breakplate.com) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/search/results/all/?keywords=Thomas%20Prata)
:::
:::

---

## Career Objective

I'm looking to connect with other founders and investors. My long-term goal is to keep pursing my companies growth and to really generate meaningfull impact within the buisness world esppecially b2b.

## About Me

I am working towards a **B.S. in Business Administration (Marketing)** from **California State Polytechnic University, Pomona**, where I also competed as an NCAA Track & Field athlete as a Decathalete. That's more or less how I've approached my career since: rather than picking one lane, I've built the range to run finance, operations, marketing, and analytics at the same time, which is exactly what early stage companies need from a co-founder.

Since 2022 I've been building **Prevent Medical Solutions** from the ground up, alongside launching **Havea**, an apparel brand I co-founded with my girlfriend, and most recently **BreakPlate**, a labor-compliance automation platform I'm building with my friend and co-founder McGwire Herbert. Details on all three are on the [Projects](projects.qmd) page.

::: {.card-section}
### Highlighted Achievements
- Co-founded and scaled **Prevent Medical Solutions** from a startup to **580+ employees**
- Designed the financial models, KPI dashboards, and workforce-analytics systems the board uses to make strategic decisions
- Currently run marketing analytics engagements for **6+ retainer clients**, spanning law firms, professional services, and consumer brands
- Deployed AI-powered client-acquisition agents that measurably increased lead volume for legal-industry clients
:::

## Core Skills

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Analytics & Data**

- SQL · Python · Advanced Excel/Sheets
- Google Analytics (GA4) · Meta Ads Manager
- Dashboard design & BI reporting
- Campaign attribution modeling
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Operations & Strategy**

- CRM management (Salesforce, HubSpot)
- Budget planning & financial oversight
- Vendor & agency management
- AI agent deployment & funnel automation
:::
:::

## Let's Connect

I'm always glad to talk to founders, investors, or fellow operators. The fastest way to reach me is [email](mailto:Tom@breakplate.com), or find me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/search/results/all/?keywords=Thomas%20Prata).

---

*Welcome to my portfolio — take a look at my [projects](projects.qmd), a live [dashboard](dashboard.qmd) of one of my ventures, and a [presentation](presentation.qmd) walking through my technical work.*
